content.en:
"Bone soldiers are not allowed to exist in the Dark Forbidden Domain, I didn't expect it to be like this!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He also thought that it was the Bone Sea Forbidden Land that restrained those bone soldiers, bone generals, and bone kings, but he didn't expect that it was not the Bone Sea Forbidden Land that bound these bone soldiers, bone generals, and bone kings, they could also come out of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, but the only price to come out was instant annihilation.

Therefore, they did not dare to come out.

"It seems that you can't copy the bone soldiers in the dark forbidden land, so the body enters the ancient sea forbidden land, steps into the ancient sea forbidden land with one hand, and then copies the bone soldiers, so that the bone soldiers appear directly in the bone sea forbidden land, so it should be no problem. Ye Tian thought to himself.

And so.

Ye Tian's body came to the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and one hand instantly stepped into the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, copying the bone soldier's body.

In the next moment, Ye Tian's hand reached back.

The body of the bone soldier appeared in the forbidden place of the Sea of Bones, and he left away from this area, and soon a powerful divine sense probed, and there was no trace of people from the outside world, so he didn't care.

However, the Bone King sensed Ye Tian's bone soldier's body, but he didn't care, after all, this was a real bone soldier.

......

"Be careful next, otherwise once this bone soldier falls, it will be easy to be discovered next time you do it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he tried his best to control his breath, and did not enter the depths of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, but only wandered outside to learn about the situation here.

There are huge bone mountains in the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, and there are some bone soldiers cultivating on each bone mountain, and there are even bone generals who are cultivating.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not dare to approach these bone mountains, and only felt the breath of the bone soldiers and bone generals from a distance, and then moved away.

And there is no Bone King on the periphery, and I don't know why the Bone King is not guarding the periphery.

In the blink of an eye, ten years have passed.

Ye Tian hadn't encountered any trouble in the past ten years, after all, he was very careful, and these bone soldiers had not fallen, most of them had been cultivating penance.

There are relatively few bone soldiers on the periphery, and there are more bone soldiers and bone generals inside the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, but if he gets close, it is easy to touch the bone soldier he copied.

It wasn't that he hadn't thought of copying the dead bone soldier, but that would be even more dangerous.

Because the bone soldiers in the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones are afraid that they all know that those bone soldiers died in battle, if they suddenly appear again, it will be strange if they are not investigated, and even if his copy body just appears, it will be discovered by the bone kings, so as to find the problem.

Therefore, he did not dare to choose the dead bone soldier as a template for replication.

"I can't get any information from the periphery of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, so let's go deep into the Bone Sea Forbidden Land!"

Ye Tian decided.

Although this decision is very risky, it is a big deal that this replica body falls, and then I will find other ways to obtain the bone beads.

So, Ye Tian cautiously went deep into the depths of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Ye Tian's luck seemed to be good, he was not exposed, and he easily entered the depths of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

At this time, he saw a huge mountain of bones, and this mountain of bones had buildings one after another.

Ye Tian directly approached this bone mountain and entered it.

This bone mountain seems to be a trading mountain, where many bone soldiers and bone generals trade, and there are some shops here.

Seeing this strange scene, Ye Tian was a little incredulous.

It's just a small forbidden place, and there is still a place to trade?

It's like the ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Realm, just such a little ancestor, really living in an area, where can it develop into a place of trading?

"I'm afraid there are a lot of bone soldiers here, beyond my imagination!"

Ye Tian realized.

Sure enough, he saw many, many bone soldiers, and the number of bone soldiers he saw right now was thousands.

Some of the bone soldiers seemed to know him and greeted him, but he didn't respond, for fear that he would say the wrong thing.

But those bone soldiers didn't seem to care, and they didn't seem to have much friendship.

If it were in the outside world, the ancestors would have seen everything in their thoughts, and they would have been discovered soon.

But this place is very suppressed, the ancestor has no way to know everything, the divine sense can't detect too far away, and there are a lot of bone soldiers, many bone soldiers stay in their own residences, and even have been in retreat, and the breath will not diffuse.

Therefore, if Ye Tian's bone soldier's body was not close to that bone soldier, it would not be easy to be discovered.

It is more likely that the bone soldier is cultivating and has not come out, nor has he perceived the situation in the outside world, so Ye Tian will not be exposed at present.

However, over time, he will definitely be exposed.

Soon, Ye Tian came to a shop.

The owner of the shop was a bone general, and when he saw Ye Tian coming, he said: "Xiao Disaster, I heard that you were injured by the ancestor who followed the Bone Kings to besiege a dark forbidden realm, but I didn't expect to recover so quickly!

"Take a look!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"These are new arrivals, look at them!" the bone general pulled out a treasure orb, and inside the orb was a treasure piece.

Ye Tian didn't know what these treasures were, and besides, he didn't know anything about this place, and he didn't have the currency here, so naturally he wouldn't really buy them.

He now wanted not only the bone beads, but also the situation here.

He felt that this place was too simple, so many bone soldiers, bone generals and bone kings comparable to the ancestors, it was too abnormal!

Moreover, the bone general mentioned the Dark Forbidden Realm, indicating that they knew what was going on in the outside world.

"Hey, I don't know what's going on with that ancestor lately, I've come in several times, and I'm almost dead!"

Ye Tian sighed.

The bone general nodded: "Indeed, there was no such situation in the past, the Dark Forbidden Domain was very weak, and the number of those ancestors was very small, and it was even more life-sparing, I didn't expect a top ancestor to enter our base many times, and killed several ancestor-level bone soldiers, but that top ancestor still died!"

Obviously, the Bone Clan in the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones thought that Ye Tian's copy body was the main body, but they didn't know that it was just a copy body.

Ye Tian kept chatting with the bone general, inquiring about information through the side, although the bone general felt confused many times in the middle, and felt that Ye Tian's speech was not normal, but the other party did not suspect Ye Tian's identity, only felt that Ye Tian was injured from time to time, and he was a little confused.

But in the end, Ye Tian still obtained some useful information.

For example, this store occasionally goes to buy goods, as for where to buy from, he doesn't know very well, but it is definitely not a forbidden place in the sea of bones.

This shows that the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones is connected to another place.

Second, the bone ancestors comparable to the ancestors are called ancestor-level bone soldiers, ancestry-level bone generals, and ancestor-level bone kings, and they are called the war bone clan.

Thirdly, the War Bone Clan once entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, but now they can't enter it, and the War Bone Clan needs the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain very much, it is said that the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain are of great help to the Battle Bone Beads, which can greatly improve their cultivation and strength.

It's like the bone beads helped Ye Tian a lot.

But he couldn't find out more information, because if he inquired from the side, he was afraid that something would go wrong.

So, he hurried out of here.
